app_title: Information on the M7.2 and M7.5 Double Earthquake — Venezuela
app_subtitle: Official figures, shaking by area, where to get help and how to stay safe
sismo_doble_banner: ⚠️ DOUBLET EARTHQUAKE: two events ~38 seconds apart ({m1} M{mag1} + {m2} M{mag2}). The shaking map combines both ShakeMaps (maximum MMI).
actualizacion_tiempo_real: 🕒 Shaking (USGS ShakeMap) and figures (GDACS/OCHA) update periodically. Each item shows its source and time.
impacto_nota: Official alert levels and estimates. Casualty figures are preliminary and vary by source; see the linked reports.
cifras_disclaimer: ⚠️ Preliminary figures: they vary by source and evolve. Each item is attributed to its source and date. For the latest, check the official links.
reportes_oficiales_link: 📄 More figures and situation reports from OCHA/ReliefWeb: [view disaster]({url}).
desaparecidos_texto: To **search for or register** a missing relative, use the official Restoring Family Links services:
desaparecidos_page_intro: How to search for or register a relative, plus cases published by official sources.
registros_nota: Use these official channels to register or search. Handling is confidential.
iniciativas_nota: Not official, but verified by international press (CNN, El Nacional). Useful to reconnect families; they do not replace official channels. Verify before sharing personal data.
sin_lista_publica: There is no public certified list of named missing persons for this event yet. When official sources publish cases, they will appear here, attributed. Meanwhile, use the official registries above.
ayuda_zona_nota: Open your area to see nearby hospitals, shelters and fire stations, with phone and address.
leyenda_zonas: Color by felt intensity (USGS): 🔴 most affected → 🟠 least affected. All areas were affected.
danos_texto: Satellite-observed damage is published by official agencies. See their damage and affected-building maps:
consejos_page_intro: Practical safety guidance after the earthquake. Based on Civil Protection, Red Cross and emergency-management recommendations.
subtitulo_zona: Felt intensity, hazards and where to get help
banner_sin_shakemap: ⛔ USGS ShakeMap is unavailable right now. This area's intensity cannot be shown until the source is restored.
leyenda_intensidad: Heatmap = felt intensity (USGS ShakeMap, MMI). Markers = help resources (OSM). It does not locate trapped people.
recursos_ninguno: No resources mapped in OSM for this area. Contact Civil Protection (171).
peligro_gf: ⚠️ Geological hazard (USGS): liquefaction probability up to {liq}% and landslide up to {des}% in parts of this area. Caution on soft ground and slopes.
intensidad_barrio_nota: Per-neighborhood data (Nominatim/OSM): USGS intensity, WorldPop resident population and USGS geological hazard. Informational.
atribucion: Data: USGS · GDACS · OCHA/ReliefWeb · OpenStreetMap (© contributors) · WorldPop · Copernicus EMS · UNOSAT · ICRC
